# Sub 12: Collapse buildScripts/ai/ into ai/scripts/{maintenance,migrations,diagnostics,runners,setup}/

## Parent Epic

#11831 — Sub 12 of Epic (folder-structure cleanup; buildScripts/ai/ collapse).

## Scope

Collapse `buildScripts/ai/` (19 files) into `ai/scripts/{category}/`. The "build vs ai" split was random — neither folder maps cleanly to build-pipeline boundaries. After this Sub, `buildScripts/ai/` directory deleted entirely; `buildScripts/` reverts to genuine-build-pipeline content only (apps/release/build subdirs unchanged).

## Source moves

`buildScripts/ai/` → `ai/scripts/maintenance/` (12 files):
- backup.mjs
- buildKbAgentFaqs.mjs
- defragChromaDB.mjs
- defragSQLiteDB.mjs
- downloadKnowledgeBase.mjs
- ingestTenant.mjs
- kbPushClient.mjs
- recreateGraphDb.mjs
- restore.mjs
- syncGithubWorkflow.mjs
- syncKnowledgeBase.mjs
- uploadKnowledgeBase.mjs

`buildScripts/ai/` → `ai/scripts/migrations/` (1 file):
- migrateMemoryCore.mjs

`buildScripts/ai/` → `ai/scripts/diagnostics/` (1 file):
- mcpHealthcheck.mjs

`buildScripts/ai/` → `ai/scripts/runners/` (4 files):
- roadmapPlanner.mjs
- runAgent.mjs
- runGoldenPath.mjs
- runSandman.mjs

`buildScripts/ai/` → `ai/scripts/setup/` (1 file):
- initServerConfigs.mjs

After all moves: `buildScripts/ai/` directory deleted.

## Test moves (mirror source structure)

Audit `test/playwright/unit/ai/buildScripts/` (and `test/playwright/unit/buildScripts/ai/` if it exists) — move all specs to mirror new ai/scripts/{category}/ locations.

## package.json

11 npm script paths updated:
- `"ai:agent"`              → `./ai/scripts/runners/runAgent.mjs`
- `"ai:backup"`             → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/backup.mjs`
- `"ai:build-kb-faqs"`      → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/buildKbAgentFaqs.mjs`
- `"ai:defrag-kb"`          → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/defragChromaDB.mjs --target knowledge-base`
- `"ai:defrag-memory"`      → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/defragChromaDB.mjs --target memory-core`
- `"ai:defrag-sqlite"`      → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/defragSQLiteDB.mjs`
- `"ai:download-kb"`        → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/downloadKnowledgeBase.mjs`
- `"ai:ingest-tenant"`      → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/ingestTenant.mjs`
- `"ai:kb-push-client"`     → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/kbPushClient.mjs`
- `"ai:mcp-healthcheck"`    → `./ai/scripts/diagnostics/mcpHealthcheck.mjs`
- `"ai:restore"`            → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/restore.mjs`
- `"ai:run-sandman"`        → `./ai/scripts/runners/runSandman.mjs`

(Other npm scripts pointing at `buildScripts/ai/` files not enumerated here — audit + update.)

## .github/workflows

Audit any workflow references to `buildScripts/ai/` paths.

## Integration tests

3 known stale imports:
- `test/playwright/integration/BackupRestoreWipe.integration.spec.mjs:78` — `await import('./buildScripts/ai/backup.mjs')` → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/backup.mjs`
- `test/playwright/integration/BackupRestoreWipe.integration.spec.mjs:104` — `await import('./buildScripts/ai/restore.mjs')` → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/restore.mjs`
- `test/playwright/integration/KBBackupRestoreWipe.integration.spec.mjs:500` — `await import('./buildScripts/ai/ingestTenant.mjs')` → `./ai/scripts/maintenance/ingestTenant.mjs`

## Acceptance Criteria

1. 19 source files moved into ai/scripts/{maintenance,migrations,diagnostics,runners,setup}/.
2. `buildScripts/ai/` directory deleted.
3. All test mirrors moved.
4. ~11 npm script paths updated.
5. Workflow + integration-test import path updates applied.
6. All affected specs pass.
7. `buildScripts/` contents reflect genuine-build-pipeline only (audit).

## Depends on

Sub 11 (must merge first — creates the thematic subfolders that this Sub also targets).

* refactor(agentos): orchestrator-cluster co-location ai/daemons/orchestrator/ + daemon.mjs (#11844)

Sub 8 of Epic #11831. Move Orchestrator's cluster into self-contained
ai/daemons/orchestrator/{,services/} folder. Entry-script renamed to
daemon.mjs (folder context provides daemon identity).

13 source moves + 12 test moves (mirror structure) + ai/services.mjs +
7 buildScripts/ai/ consumer-import updates + package.json ai:orchestrator
path update.

Tests: 119/119 pass (6.6s).

Subsequent subs filed: Sub 9 #11845, Sub 10 #11846, Sub 11 #11847, Sub 12 #11848.

* test(agentos): update laneC spec HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService path post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 #11844 moved HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService into
ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/. laneCManualScriptLeaseAdoption.spec.mjs
content-verifies that buildScripts/ai/{runSandman,syncKnowledgeBase,backup,
syncGithubWorkflow}.mjs import the lease service from the canonical path.
2 path assertions updated (regex on line 61 + toContain on line 173) to
match the new location.

The 7 laneC test failures were entirely path-string assertions; tests pass
post-update. Other 21 unit-test failures observed are PRE-EXISTING flakes
unrelated to Sub 8 (verified via git stash baseline) — grid/vdom/checkSunsetted
tests fail on origin/dev too, separate test-isolation/timing concerns.

* fix(agentos): update MailboxService.spec dynamic import for SwarmHeartbeatService post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 co-located SwarmHeartbeatService into ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/
but my static-import sweep regex (`from '...'`) missed dynamic `await import(...)`
call-sites. CI unit job 26335211375 caught: MailboxService.spec.mjs:49
`await import('../../../../../../ai/daemons/SwarmHeartbeatService.mjs')`
threw `Cannot find module`.

Fix: insert `/orchestrator/services` into the dynamic-import path. Local
re-run: 59/59 tests pass.

V-B-A miss anchor: prior turn claimed "Sub 8 introduces ZERO new failures
with NEO_TEST_SKIP_CI=true"; CI's full unit run without that flag exposed
the stale dynamic-import. Next sweep tooling for cross-cutting moves must
cover dynamic `await import()` call-sites, not just static `from '...'`.

FAIR-band: in-band [verify @ merge-gate]

Resolves #11848

Sub 12 (final) of Epic #11831 — collapses buildScripts/ai/ (19 files)
into ai/scripts/<cat>/ mirroring Sub 11's thematic structure. After
this Sub, buildScripts/ai/ directory deleted entirely; buildScripts/
reverts to genuine build-pipeline content only.

Source moves (19):
- maintenance/ (12): backup, buildKbAgentFaqs, defragChromaDB,
  defragSQLiteDB, downloadKnowledgeBase, ingestTenant, kbPushClient,
  recreateGraphDb, restore, syncGithubWorkflow, syncKnowledgeBase,
  uploadKnowledgeBase
- migrations/ (1): migrateMemoryCore
- diagnostics/ (1): mcpHealthcheck
- runners/ (4): roadmapPlanner, runAgent, runGoldenPath, runSandman
- setup/ (1): initServerConfigs

Test moves (12): mirror source by category. One pre-existing spec
util/check-chore-sync.spec.mjs tests buildScripts/util/ (non-AI),
left in place — out of Sub 12 scope.

External consumers (34 files updated via substring sweep + manual fixes):
- package.json: 16 npm script paths (ticket listed 11; actual 16
  including prepare hook + sync-github-workflow + sync-kb)
- ai/deploy/docker-compose.yml: 2 paths
- 2 integration specs + 3 KbReconciliationService.spec dynamic-imports
- ai/daemons/orchestrator/{Orchestrator,TaskDefinitions}.mjs
- ai/services/knowledge-base/DatabaseService + memory-core variant

Manual V-B-A fixes (sweep-missed patterns from Subs 9/10/11 lessons):
- TaskDefinitions kbSync + backup args: refactored awkward
  path.resolve(scriptDir, '../../ai/scripts/maintenance/X') →
  path.join(scriptDir, 'maintenance', 'X'). daemon.spec assertions
  matched. Consistent with Sub-11 summary pattern.
- laneCManualScriptLeaseAdoption.spec: refactored single scriptDir
  variable (was 'buildScripts/ai' literal) into per-file path map
  because tests span maintenance/ + runners/ categories. Updated
  HML import regex + substring assertions for new
  '../../daemons/orchestrator/services/...' source path. Added
  explicit Neo + core imports (latent cross-spec coupling).
- peer-architecture.spec: REPO_ROOT depth +1; regex updated from
  ai\/services\.mjs → \/services\.mjs (source now uses
  '../../services.mjs' not '...ai/services.mjs').
- restore-hardening.spec: repoRoot path.resolve depth +1.
- Doc-string updates: 19 @module annotations + 3 test.describe strings.

V-B-A composite lesson applied (Subs 9/10/11/12):
1. Substring sweep for explicit path strings
2. Relative-path proximity grep for paths missing the literal segment
3. path.join(scriptDir, X) audit for filename-as-arg patterns
4. Isolated-worker Neo-import check for cross-spec coupling
5. Doc-string + describe-name cleanup for non-code references

Local validation:
- Moved-spec subsuites: 220/220 pass
- Full unit suite: 1995 pass / 21 fail / 2 skip / 24 did-not-run —
  all 21 failures pre-existing flakes (Authorization, checkAllAgentIdle,
  checkSunsetted, resumeHarness, trioWakeCooldown, QueryReRanker,
  SessionSummarization, TextEmbeddingService.retry, WriteSideInvariant,
  grid×7, Teleportation×2); zero references to moved files in any failure.

Epic #11831 complete: Subs 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 all landed. ai/daemons/,
ai/scripts/, buildScripts/ai/ structure now fully refactored to
self-contained per-daemon folders + thematic script categorization +
buildScripts/ reverted to genuine build-pipeline only.

Per @tobiu "you and me" instruction: no peer-review broadcast on this lane."
- 2026-05-23T17:00:28Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11853
- 2026-05-23T17:12:01Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `ac1207d` - "fix(agentos): depth-shift missed '../../X' patterns post-Sub-12 collapse (#11848)

CI install failed: `npm prepare` hook → `node ai/scripts/maintenance/downloadKnowledgeBase.mjs`
→ `Cannot find module '/home/runner/work/neo/neo/ai/package.json'`.

Root cause: Sub 12 depth-shift sweep handled `'../../src/'` → `'../../../src/'`
and `'../../ai/<sub>/'` → `'../../<sub>/'` collapses, but missed:

- `'../../package.json'` (was repo-root from buildScripts/ai/; now resolves to
  ai/package.json from ai/scripts/<cat>/) — broke downloadKnowledgeBase +
  uploadKnowledgeBase
- `'../../ROADMAP.md'` — broke roadmapPlanner
- `'../../ai/agent/'` (agent/ wasn't in my known sub-list along with services,
  daemons, mcp, etc.) — broke runAgent

Fix: 4 targeted single-line replacements. Local smoke-test:
- downloadKnowledgeBase --help: ✓ runs
- uploadKnowledgeBase --help: ✓ runs (triggers defrag pre-step)
- runAgent --help: ✓ initializes orchestrator
- roadmapPlanner syntax-check: ✓

V-B-A lesson: when shifting depths for moved files, audit ALL '../../X'
patterns (regardless of whether X is under a known subdir prefix). Allow-list
approach (`src/`, `node_modules/`, `services/`...) misses repo-root files
(package.json, ROADMAP.md, LICENSE etc.). Deny-list — "what relative paths
do these files use that resolve outside the new parent?" — would have caught
all 4 at once."
- 2026-05-23T17:20:39Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `4caac5d` - "fix(agentos): 13 missed __dirname depth shifts post-Subs-11/12 (#11848)

CI install failed: `npm prepare` → initServerConfigs.mjs reported
"MCP Server directory not found" → ai/services.mjs couldn't load the
gitignored config.mjs (normally generated by initServerConfigs from
config.template.mjs).

Root cause: my Sub 11 + Sub 12 sweeps depth-shifted `from '...'` import
strings but missed `path.resolve(__dirname, '../..')` and `'../../'`
computed-path patterns. These return repo-root or `.neo-ai-data/`
locations and need an extra `..` per level the script moved deeper.

13 fixes across:
- initServerConfigs.mjs: cwd `'../../'` → `'../../../'`
- diagnostics/{analyzeNlTelemetry, detectTruncatedTimelines,
  diagnoseMcpConcurrency, validateConceptEdges}: ROOT_DIR/projectRoot
  needed +1
- lifecycle/{harnessLifecycle, inflightLock, resumeHarness,
  wakeSafetyGate}: `'../../.neo-ai-data/...'` patterns needed +1
- maintenance/{backup, defragChromaDB, defragSQLiteDB, restore}:
  PROJECT_ROOT needed +1 (was 2-deep from buildScripts/ai/, now 3-deep)

These were latent — none of Sub 11's CI checks invoked the affected
code paths. Sub 12's `npm prepare` hook triggered initServerConfigs,
surfacing the class. Sister scripts in lifecycle/diagnostics/maintenance
would have failed at first runtime invocation if not fixed now.

Local smoke-test: `node ai/scripts/setup/initServerConfigs.mjs`:
- Before: "MCP Server directory not found, skipping config initialization"
- After: "Config missing for MCP server 'gitlab-workflow'. Cloning from template..."

V-B-A composite lesson update: cross-cutting folder moves need a sweep
class beyond `from '...'` import strings — also audit ANY
`path.resolve(__dirname, ...)` / `path.join(__dirname, ...)` for
relative components. Same depth-shift rule applies."
- 2026-05-23T17:29:04Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `65152bd` - "fix(agentos): update Dockerfile + pre-push-hook for buildScripts/ai collapse (#11848)

CI integration failed: Docker build step
  RUN npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && node ./buildScripts/ai/initServerConfigs.mjs
errored with "Cannot find module '/app/buildScripts/ai/initServerConfigs.mjs'".

Sub 12's substring sweep ran against *.mjs, *.json, *.yml, *.yaml.
Missed file types:
- Dockerfile (no extension): ai/deploy/Dockerfile:19
- Shell scripts: examples/cloud-deployment/pre-push-hook.sh (lines 16, 18)

Fixes (3):
- Dockerfile: ./buildScripts/ai/initServerConfigs.mjs → ./ai/scripts/setup/initServerConfigs.mjs
- pre-push-hook.sh: NEO_KB_PUSH_CLIENT + NEO_INGEST_CLI defaults updated to ai/scripts/maintenance/

V-B-A composite lesson update (Subs 9/10/11/12):
Cross-cutting folder moves' substring-sweep file-type matrix needs
extension-less filenames (Dockerfile, Makefile) + shell scripts (.sh)
in addition to .mjs/.json/.yml/.yaml. Documentation files (.md) are
deliberately excluded — they describe historical context, not runtime
behavior. But operational artifacts (Dockerfiles, hooks, env scripts)
ARE runtime-load-bearing."
